comment: Thresholds pre-committed from VE-004-importer-cycle-financing.md BEFORE the run. Fill 'observed' after field work, then: python3 opportunity-intelligence/tools/run.py verdict knowledge-base/validation/VE-004-result.json

metrics.name: gap_confirmed_interviews
metrics.description: of 15 interviews: first-person confirmation of upfront-pay/collect-later gap

metrics.name: term_sheet_acceptance_pct
metrics.description: % of >=40 qualified importers accepting the priced, routing-conditional term sheet

on_pass: Design OPP-013 concierge MVP (manual FX transfer + manual financing on AstraTech licence, gated on EV-018 rail-quality fix); hand verbatims to Workstream A for SEG upgrade
on_fail: Reclassify OPP-013 as Weak in BACKLOG.md; if gap confirmations failed, flag SEG-uae-importers-upfront-pay thesis to Workstream A
on_inconclusive: One metric passed: extend offers by 20 or re-segment by corridor (China vs India vs Turkey) before deciding
